impact:
Blocks `npm run build` on strict TypeScript. Pre-existing Basejump v0.0.3 bug — was masked by stale `.next` cache. Now exposed after T-001 purged .next during dead-code cleanup. Every subsequent BUILD verification in autonomous mode will fail until fixed. Similar untyped-children pattern may exist in sibling Basejump components (settings/layout.tsx sibling files).</impact>
